content:
- Continued task 10a from TO BE VERIFIED, performed deep skeptical verification with broad parallel repository audit, and altered the plan (added HA e2e direct-path bypass remediation and explicit test-real suite coverage).
- Implemented centralized real-binary policy in src/test_harness/binaries.rs with PGTUSKMASTER_REQUIRE_REAL_BINARIES parsing, require-or-skip wrappers, and new policy unit tests.
- Migrated real-binary tests in src/test_harness/pg16.rs, src/test_harness/etcd3.rs, src/pginfo/worker.rs, src/process/worker.rs, and src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs to shared helper behavior; removed HA e2e direct .tools path checks in favor of helper-based resolution.
- Added Makefile test-real target with enforced env and explicit real suites; documented prerequisites and enforced-vs-default flow in RUST_SYSTEM_HARNESS_PLAN.md.
- Ran gates with evidence in .ralph/evidence/10a-enforce-real-binaries/gates: make check, make test (first run failed with stale archive missing object; recovered via cargo clean and reran successfully), make test-bdd, make lint, make test-real; also captured acceptance grep artifacts for make test/lint phrases.
- Updated task 10a status/checklist to done/passing, added a durable learning to AGENTS.md, and ran .ralph/task_switch.sh.
- Next step before quitting: commit all touched files (including .ralph updates and evidence artifacts) with required message format.

- Read .ralph/current_tasks.md after loading progress log (no prior entries shown).
- Applied bug-first rule: all bug tasks listed are done with <passes>true</passes>/<passing>true</passing>, so no failing bug to prioritize.
- Applied priority selection among remaining false tasks: picked .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/10b-task-dcs-real-etcd3-store-adapter-and-tests.md as the next unblocked high-priority task (earliest/high-priority logical continuation before lower/no-priority work and before recurring meta-task because false tasks exist).
- Wrote selected path to .ralph/current_task.txt and stopped.

- Read prior progress log and loaded active task from .ralph/current_task.txt -> .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/10b-task-dcs-real-etcd3-store-adapter-and-tests.md.
- Performed parallel exploration across DCS store/worker modules, etcd harness, binary enforcement helpers, dependency declarations, and related story task files.
- Confirmed etcd adapter/dependency already exist; identified gaps against 10b acceptance wording (watch stream contract clarity, real-binary enforcement helper usage in tests, explicit real step_once integration coverage, decode-failure integration coverage).
- Wrote a detailed phased implementation plan into the 10b task file under <implementation_plan> and appended required marker: TO BE VERIFIED.
- Next step for next context window: if task file still ends with TO BE VERIFIED, run deep skeptical verification, change at least one plan item, then replace marker with NOW EXECUTE.
